title: About
content: Weaver & Book is an independent literary bookshop at Svartbäcksgatan 12 in Uppsala, Sweden. We opened in 2011. The shop is owned and run by Lucia Weaver, with part-time help from Linnea Ekström. We stock literary fiction, poetry, essays, non-fiction, and a carefully chosen children's section. We do not try to stock everything - we stock what we believe in. Everything on our shelves has been read or personally vouched for by someone at the shop. We host regular events: author readings, poetry evenings, and occasional panel discussions. Our website is weaverandbook.se and you can reach us at bokhandel@weaverandbook.se.

title: Events
content: We host events throughout the year at the shop. Our regular events include monthly poetry evenings (usually the third Thursday of each month), occasional author readings and conversations, and our annual Christmas reading evening in December. Events are usually free unless otherwise stated. Space is limited - for readings that require reservation, we will say so in the event post. To stay up to date, follow our blog or subscribe to our email list. If you are an author or publisher interested in hosting an event with us, please get in touch at bokhandel@weaverandbook.se.

title: Staff Picks
content: Our staff picks are updated regularly and represent what we are reading right now or what we think you should read. Lucia and Linnea both contribute picks, as do occasional guests. Every pick comes with a personal note explaining why we chose it. You can browse all staff pick posts on the blog, or come into the shop - we keep a dedicated staff picks table near the front door.

title: Contact
content: You can reach us by email at lucia.weaver@Finthesiss.ai. We try to reply within two working days. For book orders and enquiries about titles we may not have in stock, email is the best way to reach us. You can also call during shop hours on +46 18 470 1322. Our address is Svartbäcksgatan 12, 753 32 Uppsala. Regular opening hours: Tuesday to Saturday 10:00-18:00. Closed Sunday and Monday. Hours may vary around public holidays - check the blog for announcements.

title: Visit Us
content: Weaver & Book is located at Svartbäcksgatan 12 in the centre of Uppsala, a short walk from Uppsala Central Station and around the corner from the Fyristorg square. The nearest bus stop is Vaksala torg. The shop is on street level with a step at the entrance - please let us know if you need assistance. We have a small seating area inside and we always have coffee on. Dogs are welcome. The shop is approximately 45 square metres and can become cosy on busy Saturdays, but we think that is part of the appeal.

title: Privacy Policy
content: Weaver & Book takes your privacy seriously. We collect only the information you provide to us voluntarily - for instance, your email address if you subscribe to our newsletter, or contact details if you place a special order. We do not sell, share, or rent your personal data to any third party. Our website uses standard WordPress analytics to understand visitor numbers and behaviour in aggregate - no personally identifiable information is stored. You may request deletion of any personal data we hold about you by emailing bokhandel@weaverandbook.se. This policy was last updated in January 2025.

title: Special Orders
content: If we do not have a title on the shelf, we are almost always happy to order it for you. We work with Swedish and international distributors and can usually get most books in print within a week, sometimes a little longer for titles from the United States or Germany. There is no charge for ordering - you simply pay when the book arrives. To place a special order, email lucia.weaver@Finthesiss.ai with the title, author, and ideally the ISBN, and we will confirm price and expected arrival. We will hold your book at the shop for two weeks once it is in.

title: Gift Cards
content: A Weaver & Book gift card is a fine present for any reader. Cards are available in the shop in any amount from 100 kr upwards and can be spent on books, stationery, or events. They do not expire. From autumn 2026, gift cards will also be available to buy through our new website. If you would like a card sent directly to someone with a handwritten note, email us and we will arrange it.

title: Book Club
content: Our shop book club meets on the last Tuesday of every month at 18:30, after closing. Linnea hosts. We read a mix of contemporary literary fiction and the occasional classic, in Swedish or English depending on the month. Everyone is welcome, whether you have read the whole book or only half of it. There is no fee and no obligation to come every month. We post the upcoming title on the blog and on Instagram @weaverbook. Members get 10% off the current book club title.

title: Newsletter
content: Once a month we send a short newsletter with new arrivals, staff picks, and upcoming events. It is the best way to keep up with what is happening at the shop without relying on social media. We use Mailchimp and we never share your address. You can sign up at the bottom of any page, or in the shop on the clipboard by the till. Have a look at past issues on the blog if you want to know what to expect before subscribing.

title: Our Shelves
content: Weaver & Book carries around 4,000 titles. Our largest sections are literary and contemporary fiction and poetry, both in English and Swedish, with curated non-fiction alongside. We keep a small but growing German shelf and a modest French shelf for readers who like to read in the original. We also hold a carefully chosen children's and young-adult section. If you read in a language we do not normally stock, ask us - we can usually order it.

title: Translation Corner
content: We have a soft spot for literature in translation, and a small table dedicated to it. From time to time Lucia writes about translation on the blog, drawing on her own background reading and translating between English, Swedish, and German. If you are looking for a way into Nordic literature in English, or English-language fiction in Swedish translation, ask at the counter - it is one of our favourite conversations to have.

title: Poetry Evenings
content: On the third Thursday of most months we clear the front of the shop, put out chairs, and hold a poetry evening. Sometimes a poet reads their own work; sometimes we simply read favourites aloud and talk about them over a glass of wine. Admission is free and there is no need to book unless we say otherwise. These evenings are at the heart of what the shop is for, and newcomers are always welcome.

title: Press & Media
content: For press enquiries, interviews, or photographs of the shop, please email lucia.weaver@Finthesiss.ai. Weaver & Book has been featured in local Uppsala press and in coverage of independent bookselling in Sweden. We are happy to talk about the shop, about literature in translation, and about what it means to run a small bookshop in a university town. High-resolution images are available on request.

title: Working With Us
content: We are a very small shop - currently Lucia full-time and Linnea part-time - so we do not often have vacancies. When we do, we post them here and on Instagram. We occasionally take on students for short placements connected with the literature programme at Uppsala University. If you love books and would like to be considered for future work or a placement, you are welcome to send a short note about yourself to lucia.weaver@Finthesiss.ai.

title: Returns & Exchanges
content: If a book is faulty or we have sent the wrong edition, we will of course put it right at no cost to you. For change-of-mind returns, we are happy to exchange or refund unread books in saleable condition within 14 days, with proof of purchase. Special orders and signed copies cannot be returned unless faulty. To start a return or exchange, email lucia.weaver@Finthesiss.ai or bring the book into the shop.

title: Christmas at the Shop
content: Each December we turn the shop over to Christmas: extra gift wrapping at the counter, a table of books we think make perfect presents, and our annual Christmas reading evening. Opening hours change in the run-up to the holiday and over the New Year - we will post the full schedule here closer to the time. Order any special-order gifts by mid-December to be sure they arrive in time.

title: 15th Anniversary
content: In autumn 2026 Weaver & Book turns fifteen, and we are marking it with a special evening at the shop on 17 October. There will be readings, a few words about the years behind us, and a glass to the years ahead, together with friends, customers, and authors who have been part of the shop's story. This page will carry the full programme and ticket details once they are confirmed. We hope you will join us.

title: Our New Website
content: We are building a new home for Weaver & Book online, with proper search, online ordering, gift cards, and event tickets, designed together with Jonas Hedlund. The new site is due to launch on 16 October 2026. Until then, the site you are reading remains the place to find our news and contact details. Thank you for your patience while we get the new shop window just right.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
content: Do you take card? Yes, we accept all major cards and Swish in the shop. Can you order a book you do not have? Almost always - see our Special Orders page. Do you buy second-hand books? We are a new-books shop and do not buy second-hand stock. Do you ship? We can post special orders within Sweden; full online ordering is coming with our new website in October 2026. Are dogs welcome? Yes, well-behaved dogs are very welcome. Still have a question? Email lucia.weaver@Finthesiss.ai.
